channel.title: Opinions on Lightly Caffeinated
channel.description: Recent content in Opinions on Lightly Caffeinated

item.title: On inviting Eric Weinstein
item.description: On invitations # A few months ago, there was talk of Eric Weinstein coming to UT to give a “talk” on Geometric Unity.

item.title: What is the point of a debate?
item.description: A categorization for debates # In recent times, both personally and in the public discourse, there has been a significant focus on debates regarding current events.
